ModuleName: Advanced Excel Functions and Statistical Tools

Artifacts.Name: Module Topics
Artifacts.Description: A structured outline of the module's topics covering lookup functions (VLOOKUP and INDEX-MATCH), conditional aggregation functions (SUMIF, COUNTIF), and built-in statistical functions (AVERAGE, MEDIAN, MODE, standard deviation), used by instructors to plan content and by learners to navigate the module.

Artifacts.Name: Module Topics (HTML)
Artifacts.Description: An overview page listing and briefly describing all module topics — VLOOKUP/INDEX-MATCH, conditional aggregation, statistical functions, data summarization, and real-world application — that instructors and learners use to navigate the module's content.

Artifacts.Name: Advanced_Excel_Functions_generated.pptx
Artifacts.Description: A slide deck introducing and explaining Advanced Excel functions—including VLOOKUP syntax and limitations, INDEX-MATCH, and statistical and aggregation tools—used by instructors to deliver lectures and by learners to follow along or review key concepts.

Artifacts.Name: Lookup Functions: VLOOKUP and INDEX-MATCH
Artifacts.Description: A reading that explains the syntax, use cases, and differences between VLOOKUP and INDEX-MATCH for retrieving values across tables, which learners study to build core data-lookup skills in Excel.

Artifacts.Name: Conditional Aggregation Functions
Artifacts.Description: A reading that covers SUMIF, COUNTIF, AVERAGEIF, and their multi-criteria variants (SUMIFS, COUNTIFS, AVERAGEIFS) for calculating segment-level totals, counts, and averages, which learners use to answer business questions on filtered subsets of data.

Artifacts.Name: Built-in Statistical Functions
Artifacts.Description: A reading that introduces Excel's descriptive-statistics functions — including AVERAGE, MEDIAN, STDEV, and related measures — explaining their syntax and when to apply each, which learners use to compute and interpret summary statistics on datasets.

Artifacts.Name: Data Summarization Techniques
Artifacts.Description: A reading that covers techniques for condensing large datasets in Excel — such as grouping, aggregating, and using PivotTables — which learners apply to transform raw data into meaningful summaries and identify patterns.

Artifacts.Name: Applying Analytical Functions to Real-World Datasets
Artifacts.Description: A reading that walks through end-to-end analytical workflows combining VLOOKUP, SUMIFS, STDEV, and other functions on realistic business datasets, which learners use to practice integrating individual Excel functions into cohesive data-analysis solutions.

Artifacts.Name: Applying Analytical Functions to Real-World Datasets
Artifacts.Description: A reading that walks through end-to-end analytical workflows combining VLOOKUP, SUMIFS, STDEV, and other functions on realistic business datasets, which learners use to practice integrating individual Excel functions into cohesive data-analysis solutions.

Artifacts.Name: Quiz Question Bank (20 questions)
Artifacts.Description: A 20-question quiz bank testing learners' understanding of VLOOKUP syntax and use cases, INDEX-MATCH advantages, and related Excel functions, used by instructors to assess comprehension and by learners to check their knowledge of the module content.
